codeReview.summary: The Africa/MENA RSS expansion adds the promised regional feeds and the final integrated codebase satisfies the related coverage goals. I did not find a feature-local blocking issue after reviewing the commit, handoff, and transcript skeleton.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker procedure appears overly strict about TDD for declarative data-catalog expansion work. This feature mainly added feed metadata and only needed an assertion update after coverage changed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback for expand-rss-feeds-africa-mena recommends clarifying that pure data additions may not need the same TDD flow as behavior changes.

summary: Pass. The feed expansion looks correct and materially improves African/MENA coverage; only a process-level skill observation was noted.
